UpdateServiceConfig.serviceNames: List of service names; supports updating configuration to multiple services simultaneously
UpdateServiceConfig.sampleConfig: Sampling configuration; if not specified, this configuration will not be updated
UpdateServiceConfig.loggingConfig: Log correlation configuration; if not specified, this configuration will not be updated
UpdateServiceConfig.loggingConfig.project: Project that the log store belongs to
UpdateServiceConfig.loggingConfig.traceIdIndex: Method for searching traceId in logs; options: `FIELD` - search by specified field (default), `FULLTEXT` - full-text search
UpdateServiceConfig.loggingConfig.traceIdKey: Key used for searching when traceIdIndex=FIELD; default: trace_id
UpdateServiceConfig.loggingConfig.spanIdIndex: Method for searching spanId in logs; options: `FIELD` - search by specified field (default), `FULLTEXT` - full-text search
UpdateServiceConfig.loggingConfig.spanIdKey: Key used for searching when spanIdIndex=FIELD; default: span_id
UpdateServiceConfig.requestConfig: Request configuration; if not specified, this configuration will not be updated
UpdateServiceConfig.requestConfig.serverSlowRequestThreshold: Threshold in seconds for identifying slow server requests
UpdateServiceConfig.requestConfig.dbSlowRequestThresholdSeco: Threshold in seconds for identifying slow database requests
UpdateServiceConfig.requestConfig.okHttpStatus: HTTP status codes considered as successful responses
UpdateServiceConfig.topoConfig: Topology map configuration; if not specified, this configuration will not be updated
UpdateServiceConfig.topoConfig.requestSecondsThreshold: Request duration threshold in seconds for topology analysis
UpdateServiceConfig.topoConfig.errorRateThreshold: Error rate threshold for topology alerting
UpdateServiceConfig.mllmResourceDumpConfig: Multimodal data dump configuration; if not specified, this configuration will not be updated
UpdateServiceConfig.mllmResourceDumpConfig.retentionDays: Retention duration for dumped data, in days
